notes: v0.5.4 — CRITICAL pricing fix. LIVE_RENDER_OUTPUT_PRICE_PER_TOKEN was 0.40e-6 (the text-output rate); the actual image-output rate is $30/M tokens, so the meter was understating cost by 75×. Per Google docs (ai.google.dev/gemini-api/docs/pricing) gemini-2.5-flash-image is billed at $0.039 per 1024×1024 image (1290 tokens × $30/M); free tier does NOT cover image generation on any plan. New rate constant + updated comments. UI cost line will now show realistic figures (was ~$0.001/render, will now show ~$0.039 ≈ HK$0.31).
